title: AZURYX 16x PvP Pack
description: AZURYX 16x is a clean and competitive PvP texture pack featuring smooth animations, sharp combat particles, and simplified blocks for better visibility in Bedwars, Skywars, Sword pvp and other pvp gamemodes.
body:
AZURYX 16x – Competitive PvP Texture Pack

AZURYX 16x is a clean and smooth PvP texture pack built for competitive gameplay.
Designed to improve visibility, sharpen combat, and keep your screen distraction-free.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/kyfOqPF7JLk" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


<details>
<summary>Swords</summary>

![Swords](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f1a5b6e2582a465fe3ced3f988c7d5327c11b2a6.png)

</details>



✦ Combat Effects ✦

-  Neon-style swing attack with transparent center
-  Red crit particles for better visibility
-  Blue sharpness hit particles that match the swing

 

✦ Custom Items & Armor ✦

-  Custom pearl animation
-  Custom golden apple animation
-  Clean armor textures
-  Custom enchant glint
-  Clean elytra design


<details>
<summary>Ender Pearl, Apple, Golden Apple, Armor</summary>

![Ender Pearl, Apple, Golden Apple, Armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a64778e51c577cff949a4f6efff9f175e58a2a05.png)

</details>



✦ Clean Blocks ✦

-  Clean logs and planks
-  Clean wool textures
-  Improved grass
-  Cleaner dirt and dirt variations
-  Simplified block design for PvP
-
